/usr/bin/ar qc libwren.a CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/optional/wren_opt_meta.c.o CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/optional/wren_opt_random.c.o CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/vm/wren_compiler.c.o CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/vm/wren_core.c.o CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/vm/wren_debug.c.o CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/vm/wren_primitive.c.o CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/vm/wren_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/vm/wren_value.c.o CMakeFiles/wren_static.dir/src/vm/wren_vm.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libwren.a
